a:r.a:t: Contracting Solution for PBM’s

p:cNvPr.name: Picture 6
p:cNvPr.descr: Ringmaster® Technologies, Inc Announces Its SOC 2 Type 1 Achievement

a:r.a:t: 4 Reasons Why Pharmacy
Contracts Are Difficult:

The PBM industry is under lots of scrutiny – if you do not have ironclad contract terms and monitoring procedures in place to ensure prescription claims dollars are spent according to your wishes, plan dollars can be wasted.
What
BenefitsBridge
Partners
Does for
YOU
Y
ou can be confident that your decision on PBM is the best fit for you and your beneficiaries.
You can rest assure that there is constant monitoring of your claims to protect against abusive pricing practices.
You will never fall behind the market on pricing as we can efficiently perform annual market checks.
You will have access to thought leadership at the forefront of the PBM industry.
PBM contracts are legal contracts that requires deep knowledge of possible “gotchas”.
Pharmacy comparisons require expensive 3rd party data sources.
Examples: Medi-Span, First Data Bank and NCPDP amongst others.

Pharmacy comparisons are incredibly time consuming because they require merging bidders contract terms, 3rd party data sources and client pharmacy data to compare contracts using an apples-to-apples methodology.
Plan sponsors and consultants cannot rely on the PBM’s own projections
as they always use the most favorable assumptions for themselves. PBM comparisons require certain assumptions – so a single methodology needs to be used.
